GenAiFunction.description:
Explore Data Cloud entities, their fields, and relationships. MUST be called BEFORE any QueryDataCloud or SearchDataLibrary call whenever entity or field names are not already confirmed — never guess Data Cloud names.
Scopes: - "summary": list available entities. Always start here when the entity name is uncertain. - "details": fields, primary keys, relationships for one entity. Requires entityName. - "relationships": JOIN planning — how the entity connects to others. Requires entityName.
Entity suffix conventions: - __dlm = Data Model Object - __dll = Data Lake Object - __cio = Calculated Insight - _index__dlm = search index, usable with hybrid_search()/vector_search() in QueryDataCloud - _chunk__dlm = document chunk table, used as the chunkDmo parameter for SearchDataLibrary
Retry silently up to twice on "entity not found" or "column unknown" errors from QueryDataCloud — call this action to discover the correct names, then retry. Do not stop and ask the user.
NOT for Standard/Custom SObjects (Account, Opportunity, __c objects) — use ExploreOrgSchema for those.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: My Org Butler: Explore Data Cloud
